title: Earthrise Over the Lunar Horizon
explanation: Astronauts aboard the Lunar Gateway captured this stunning view of a blue-white Earth rising above the cratered Moon's limb.

title: Crab Nebula Supernova Remnant in X-ray
explanation: Chandra X-ray Observatory reveals the energetic heart of the Crab Nebula, powered by a rapidly spinning pulsar.

title: Perseid Meteor Shower Above the Appalachians
explanation: Multiple Perseids streak across a clear August sky over West Virginia's dark-sky preserve.

title: Earth's Ozone Layer: A Composite from Aura
explanation: NASA's Aura satellite stitches together a global map of stratospheric ozone concentrations, essential for monitoring atmospheric health.

title: Northern Lights Over Lake Erie
explanation: A strong geomagnetic storm pushed the aurora borealis to mid-latitudes, lighting the skies green and crimson above the Great Lakes.

title: Smoke Plumes Over the Mid-Atlantic: A GOES-16 Timelapse
explanation: GOES-16 imagery captures wildfire smoke drifting from the Appalachians across Maryland and the Chesapeake Bay region, coloring sunsets orange and elevating fine-particle PM2.5 levels.

title: Jupiter's Moon Io: Active Volcanism from Juno
explanation: Juno's latest close flyby of Io shows plumes from Pele-class eruptions rising hundreds of kilometers above the sulfurous surface.

title: Heart Nebula in Narrow-Band Light
explanation: Hydrogen-alpha emission reveals the glowing ionized gas of IC 1805 in the Perseus spiral arm.

title: Chesapeake Bay Sediment Plume from Landsat 9
explanation: Heavy autumn rains flush nutrient-laden sediment into the Chesapeake Bay. Landsat 9 captures turbidity fronts as brown plumes mixing with clearer coastal water.

title: Geminid Meteor Shower Over Maryland
explanation: Peak Geminid activity produces a fireball every few minutes above a lightly frosted Maryland field, captured in a two-hour composite exposure.

title: Winter Solstice Sun from Space
explanation: DSCOVR's EPIC camera captures a full-disk Earth on the Northern Hemisphere's shortest day, showing the Antarctic polar cap bathed in continuous sunlight.

title: Pillars of Creation — JWST Near-Infrared Revisit
explanation: James Webb Space Telescope revisits the iconic Eagle Nebula pillars, adding new detail to stellar nurseries embedded deep within the dust columns.

title: Baltimore Urban Heat Island from ECOSTRESS
explanation: NASA's ECOSTRESS thermal sensor aboard the ISS captures the urban heat island effect over Baltimore: downtown surfaces reach 8–12°F above surrounding suburban greenspaces.

title: Orion Molecular Cloud in Infrared
explanation: Spitzer archival imagery combined with WISE data reveals the warm dust glow of the Orion star-forming complex across 300 light-years.

title: Polar Vortex Disruption from GOES-East
explanation: GOES-East captures the stratospheric polar vortex fragment descending into the mid-latitudes, heralding a week of below-normal temperatures across the eastern United States.

title: Mars Dust Storm Season: Perseverance Vantage
explanation: Perseverance's Mastcam-Z captures an approaching regional dust storm over Jezero Crater's rim, dimming the afternoon sky from salmon to deep orange.

title: Atlantic PM2.5 Plumes: MERRA-2 Reanalysis Mosaic
explanation: NASA MERRA-2 reanalysis data visualizes fine-particulate aerosol optical depth over the eastern seaboard during high-pollution days in fall 2025.

title: Earth Day: Amazon Deforestation Scar from Landsat
explanation: On Earth Day, Landsat 9 imagery documents the expanding agricultural frontier in Para state, Brazil, contrasting lush primary forest with bare ochre soil.

title: Solar Flare Extreme Ultraviolet — SDO AIA 131
explanation: NASA's Solar Dynamics Observatory captures an X1.4 solar flare in extreme ultraviolet light, illuminating plasma loops arcing millions of kilometers above the solar surface.

title: A Total Lunar Eclipse over the Andes
explanation: The fully eclipsed Moon glows copper-red above a high desert ridge line.

title: Jupiter and Its Great Red Spot
explanation: A sharpened amateur image reveals swirling bands and the famous storm.

title: Noctilucent Clouds at Midnight
explanation: Electric-blue clouds at the edge of space shine after sunset over the Baltic.

title: The Andromeda Galaxy Up Close
explanation: A mosaic of our nearest large galactic neighbor spanning six degrees of sky.

title: A Flight Through the Orion Nebula
explanation: A short visualization soars through the glowing star-forming region.

title: Saturn at Opposition
explanation: Rings tilted toward Earth catch the sunlight at the planet's closest approach.

title: Sunspot Region AR4012 in Close Up
explanation: A high-resolution view of a complex sunspot group near the solar limb.
